description_long: This is a stylized doll with a pale complexion, featuring a voluminous, tiered black skirt and a white sleeveless top with a cutout at the chest. The doll has distinctive light pink hair styled in large, rounded twin buns, and wears a black choker with a bow at the neck. Its arms are slender and extended outward, and the legs are clad in white socks with black, high-platform boots adorned with metallic buckles. The facial features are delicate, with a small mouth and large, expressive eyes, giving the doll a slightly gothic or Harajuku-inspired appearance. The overall design is modern and fashion-forward, with a monochrome palette accented by the pastel hair.
description: A fashion-forward doll with pink twin-bun hair, a black tiered skirt, white top, and chunky black boots, styled in a modern, gothic-inspired look.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the doll's twin-bun hairstyle, the layered black skirt, and the back of the boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the side of the skirt, and the platform boots' buckles.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the doll's facial features, pink hair, choker, cutout top, and the full detail of the skirt and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the profile of the face, side of the skirt, and boot details.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll wears a black, tiered, high-waisted skirt paired with a sleeveless white top featuring a chest cutout, complemented by a black choker with a bow, white socks, and black high-platform boots with metallic buckles. The style blends gothic and Harajuku street fashion influences, with a monochrome palette and pastel hair accent.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with both arms extended outward at a slight angle, legs straight and parallel, head facing forward, and torso erect, presenting a static, neutral pose.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll's face has a neutral expression, with a small, closed mouth, wide eyes, and relaxed eyebrows, conveying a calm and composed demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: Short, pastel pink hair styled into two large, rounded twin buns on either side of the head, with some loose strands framing the face.
